brand.name: AVATIR
brand.shellDescription: Manage users and agreements from a polished mobile-first workspace.

auth.heroHeading: Assurance deal management that feels premium on mobile.
auth.heroSubtext: Sign in or create an account to manage users and agreements with a focused, polished workspace.

benefits.workspace: Track assurance deals from one mobile-first workspace.
benefits.dataModel: Keep users and agreements organized with a clean data model.
benefits.google: Prepare Google sign-in now and wire credentials later.

auth.shellReadyDetail: The first pass includes the auth screen, Google placeholder, and navigation for users and agreements.
auth.signInDescription: Use the existing account flow or switch to signup to create a new workspace identity.
auth.signUpDescription: Create a profile for your team and get ready to manage assurance deals.
auth.googlePending: Google sign-in will be connected when credentials are added.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.body: Add list, create, edit, and detail flows for users and agreements. The shell is already mobile-first and ready for data.

googleAuth.title: Google auth
googleAuth.body: The login button is in place now. The next backend step is wiring real OAuth credentials and a session token.

users.title: Users
users.description: This is the first placeholder view for the users management flow.

agreements.title: Agreements
agreements.description: This placeholder view gives the agreements workflow a clean starting point.
